mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_price), 0) FROM netcafe_sale_order WHERE DATE(create_time) = CURDATE() AND del_flag = '0'
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM netcafe_usage_record WHERE status = '0' AND del_flag = '0'
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM netcafe_machine WHERE del_flag = '0'

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(d.date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS day, COALESCE(SUM(o.total_price), 0) AS amount FROM ( SELECT CURDATE() - INTERVAL 6 DAY AS date UNION ALL SELECT CURDATE() - INTERVAL 5 DAY AS date UNION ALL SELECT CURDATE() - INTERVAL 4 DAY AS date UNION ALL SELECT CURDATE() - INTERVAL 3 DAY AS date UNION ALL SELECT CURDATE() - INTERVAL 2 DAY AS date UNION ALL SELECT CURDATE() - INTERVAL 1 DAY AS date UNION ALL SELECT CURDATE() AS date ) d LEFT JOIN netcafe_sale_order o ON DATE(o.create_time) = d.date AND o.del_flag = '0' GROUP BY d.date ORDER BY d.date ASC
